name: @tsnuke/rules-functional-patterns-effect
description: tsnuke's `functional-patterns` rule category: 7 SYN AST predicates that catch GoF/imperative class shapes a TS-speaker should write as a function, tagged union, or stream method (Singleton/Builder/Factory class shapes; manual Iterator class; `for`-loop accumulator/groupBy; `reduce(...,concat)`). Detects anti-patterns of the `implementation-functional-patterns` skill catalog. Plain-TS AST predicates on the `@tsnuke/rules-core-effect` substrate (NOT Effect-wrapped — visitors are sync).
